enrichment.summary: Kyle films a casual vlog from his porch in Boulder, recapping recent days: recovering from exhaustion, his roommate helping with a bike tire, smoking weed (blue dream/hash oil), postponing a lipoma removal surgery, transferring music files from YouTube, setting up a new desk/computer system with an MP3 player and Sony waterproof Walkman, dealing with dying catfish, and noting body soreness and the need to stretch more.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Will do it himself since roommate and family all backed out
Gets him much higher than expected, especially when already tired
Admits he neglects water changes and needs to do them every two weeks on schedule
Leans toward getting a bunch of tetras next time
Knows he needs to do it daily, especially given increasing muscle soreness
